data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) merge commit 71084203f5e3 is on main with all printf dash-arg fixes applied to setup.sh, agent-wizard.sh, and install.sh — all instances now use printf '%s' '->' format. (2) Launcher path override via FOOLERY_LAUNCHER_PATH env var added to install.sh with test coverage. (3) All branch commits tagged: 491c740c0829, 44fad41c04c0, 64ac7f3d4cb7, 71084203f5e3. (4) No invariants to check. (5) No bare printf '->' remaining in any shell scripts. (6) CI green per shipment note.
